themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 13 verses. Commentary leans on "And the king said, Who is in the court? Now Haman was come into the outward court of the king...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".
